name: telegram-dev
description: Telegram 生态开发全栈指南 - 涵盖 Bot API、Mini Apps (Web Apps)、MTProto 客户端开发。包括消息处理、支付、内联模式、Webhook、认证、存储、传感器 API 等完整开发资源。
capabilities: Create Telegram bots with Bot API and handle messages
Build Mini Apps with JavaScript WebApp SDK
Add inline keyboards and interactive buttons
Use TDLib for custom client development
author: 2025Emma
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill containing educational content for Telegram bot development. All code examples are standard, legitimate API usage patterns targeting official Telegram endpoints. The 471 static findings are false positives triggered by markdown code formatting (backticks), legitimate SHA-256 HMAC for initData validation, and standard web APIs. No malicious code, credential theft patterns, or suspicious network activity detected.
valueStatement: Need to create a Telegram bot or web app? This skill provides complete guides for Bot API, Mini Apps, and client development with practical code examples.
userTitle: Build Telegram Bots and Mini Apps
limitations: Does not include executable code or scripts to run
Requires your own Telegram Bot token and API credentials
Does not cover backend hosting or deployment configurations
Mini App features require HTTPS and public URL

useCases.title: Chatbot Development
useCases.description: Create interactive Telegram bots for customer service, notifications, or automation tasks

useCases.title: Mini App Creation
useCases.description: Build web applications that run inside Telegram with native UI components and device access

useCases.title: Payment Integration
useCases.description: Add Telegram Stars payment system to accept payments within your bot or mini app

promptTemplates.title: Basic Bot Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: How do I create a Telegram bot and send my first message using Python?

promptTemplates.title: Webhook Configuration
promptTemplates.prompt: Configure a Flask webhook to receive Telegram updates and respond automatically

promptTemplates.title: Mini App Development
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a Telegram Mini App with main button, theme support, and data validation

promptTemplates.title: Advanced UI
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement inline keyboard with callback buttons and handle user interactions in python-telegram-bot

bestPractices: Always validate initData on the server side before trusting user data
Use environment variables to store your bot token securely
Implement rate limiting to avoid hitting Telegram API limits
antiPatterns: Do not hardcode bot tokens in source code or commit to version control
Do not trust client-side data without server-side validation
Do not make blocking API calls in handlers without using async properly

faq.question: What programming languages are supported?
faq.answer: Python, JavaScript, PHP, Go, Java, and C# have official Telegram libraries available

faq.question: What are the Telegram API rate limits?
faq.answer: Group messages max 20 per minute, private chats max 30 per second

faq.question: How do I validate Mini App user data?
faq.answer: Use HMAC-SHA256 with your bot token to verify the initData hash on your server

faq.question: Is my data safe in Telegram Mini Apps?
faq.answer: Mini Apps run in a sandbox. Store sensitive data server-side, use SecureStorage for local secrets

faq.question: Why is my webhook not receiving updates?
faq.answer: Check HTTPS certificate, public accessibility, and that the endpoint returns 200 OK quickly

faq.question: How is Bot API different from Telegram API?
faq.answer: Bot API is HTTP-based for bots only. Telegram API uses MTProto for full Telegram functionality
